_comment: CERNIQ API service — production descriptor. Phase 1 deploys here. Use `railway up --service cerniq-api` after `railway link`. NIXPACKS is the default builder; the Dockerfile.api alternative lives at infra/docker/Dockerfile.api and can be selected by setting builder='DOCKERFILE' + dockerfilePath.
_planTier: Hobby for $5K MRR runway; bump to Pro before launching paid GA so we get committed CPU and the regional failover SLA.
_region: us-east — colocate with Neon Postgres us-east; switching means re-provisioning the DB or eating cross-region read latency.

build.buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @cerniq/api prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @cerniq/api build

deploy._replicasNote: Single replica is fine pre-launch. Bump to >=2 before announcing paid plans so a single-pod restart doesn't take the verify path down. Sticky sessions NOT required — the API is stateless; Redis holds session-y state.

envVars._note: Replace with the production hostname before first deploy.

envVars._provision: Railway Postgres plugin OR Neon — paste the pooled connection string. If using Neon's pgbouncer, append ?pgbouncer=true&connection_limit=1.
Same source as DATABASE_URL but the unpooled / direct endpoint. Used by `prisma migrate deploy` only.
Railway Redis plugin OR Upstash — must include the password (rediss:// for TLS).
Generate via `pnpm tsx scripts/generate-cerniq-keys.ts --env`. NEVER reuse the dev keypair in prod.
Public companion of JWT_ED25519_PRIVATE_KEY_B64. Served at /.well-known/jwks.json.
Separate keypair from JWT — separation of duties (docs/SECURITY.md § 4).
Public companion — published at /.well-known/audit-signing-key for chain verification.

envVars._note: Swagger off in prod; enable temporarily for partner integration debugging only.

envVars._provision: Stripe dashboard → Developers → API keys → Live secret key. Rotate via Stripe before changing here.
Stripe dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → endpoint signing secret.
Sentry project settings → Client Keys (DSN). Optional — empty disables Sentry cleanly.
Pointer to the otel-collector deployment (see infra/observability/otel-collector.yaml). Internal Railway URL preferred.
Bearer token for the OTLP receiver if the collector requires auth. Format: Authorization=Bearer%20<token>.
